name: roomradar
description: RoomRadar — find student rooms and PGs near campus (Firebase backend)

scripts.deploy:firebase: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n emulators,web -c blue,green "npm run emulators" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8080 && npm run seed && npm run dev --prefix src
scripts.setup: npm install && echo. && echo Created src/.env for local emulators. Run: npm run dev
